title: Bridge Essay: Empathy Modulates the Activity of the Sensorimotor Mirror Neuron System during P

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Social Incarnation** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Social Incarnation — intersubjectivity, embodied empathy, social predictive processing, second-person neuroscience.

**Empathy Modulates the Activity of the Sensorimotor Mirror Neuron System during Pain Observation.** — Behav Sci (Basel). PMID: 37998694. DOI: 10.3390/bs13110947. The aim of this study is to analyze the brain activity patterns during the observation of painful expressions and to establish the relationship between this activity and the scores obtained on the Interpersonal Reactivity Index (IRI). The study included twenty healthy, right-handed subjects (10 women). We conducted atask-based and resting-state functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI) study.
